Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20511 0 0}Fantastic work, Takeba! You performed as well as I hoped you would.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20512 0 0}Totally! I couldn't take my eyes off you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20514 0 0}Great, looks like everyone's gotten used to handling their Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20515 0 0}Leader, take note of each member's strengths and conduct the battle accordingly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20516 0 0}I can still sense some enemies around. Let's move on.[n]{f 1 1}
